MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday, July 30, 2008: Clifford Edward Fried, counsel for plaintiff Meinhard W. Marek as Trustee of the Meinhard W. Marek and Sose A Marek Trust Dated July 30, 1997; plaintiff Meinhard W. Marek is also present; Ruth L. Hawley, Esquire, by limited scope representation of defendant Martin H. Blaqmoor, who is also present

Settlement conference is held. The case is settled. The August 4, 2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Toni Young, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
